description: P0-15: pinned NCBI Taxonomy snapshot for TaxId → lineage re-placement of the ~4% clade-incomplete corpus positives (PRD §9.2). NCBI — not GTDB — is the re-derivation source: the TaxId is a native NCBI id and the split labels are NCBI-named at a pre-2021 vintage; GTDB stays governing for novelty (P0-14) + P6 placement. Immutable dated taxdump_archive zip; MD5-verified on fetch.
license: NCBI Taxonomy — public domain (US Gov work; NCBI data-usage policies)
